sites.name: Playwright Docs
suggested_flows: Search for 'locators' and open the first result
Navigate Docs → API and expand a class

sites.name: The Internet
suggested_flows: Form Authentication: login with tomsmith / SuperSecretPassword!
File Upload: upload a file and confirm success
Dynamic Loading: click Start and wait for hidden element
Drag and Drop: swap boxes A and B

sites.name: Playwright TodoMVC Demo
suggested_flows: Add three todos, complete one, filter Active/Completed
Double-click to edit a todo, rename, blur to save

sites.name: Sauce Demo

credentials.note: Other usernames listed on the login page (e.g. locked_out_user, problem_user, performance_glitch_user) exhibit different behaviors.

suggested_flows: Login, sort by price low→high, add two items to cart
Checkout: fill shipping, complete order, see confirmation
Try locked_out_user to see the error path
